title: feat: add suno-v5, step-3.5-flash, and flux-2-dev via api.airforce
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The hive sings, writes, and paints
gist.blurb: We just dropped a triple threat of new models into the API. Whether you're generating music with Suno v5, chatting with Step 3.5 Flash, or painting with Flux 2 Dev, your creative toolkit just got a major upgrade.
gist.summary: Added Suno v5 for music generation, Step 3.5 Flash for text, and Flux 2 Dev for images to the API.
gist.impact: Developers can now access three powerful new models across audio, text, and image generation endpoints using their existing integrations.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot interacting with three distinct elements representing the new modalities: a musical note (Suno), a glowing text scroll (Step), and a paintbrush/canvas (Flux). The Monitor Robot watches excitedly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny artist beret, juggling a glowing musical note, a glowing text scroll, and a pixelated paintbrush. A chunky Monitor Robot watches in awe, its screen glowing with a lime green (#ecf874) smiley face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit Stardew Valley aesthetic, emotionally warm.
